title: Strange EoE trailer
wikitext:
[]: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Sun Sep 11, 2011 12:23 am I found this trailer for EoE to be kind of odd http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gk72E4qgEng firstly, the man's voice is too deep (in my view) secondly, why is Misato kissijng Shinji??

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Sep 11, 2011 1:24 am ...

[]: Re: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:07 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: I found this trailer for EoE to be kind of odd http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gk72E4qgEng firstly, the man's voice is too deep (in my view) secondly, why is Misato kissijng Shinji??

[]: Re: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:26 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: firstly, the man's voice is too deep (in my view)

[]: Re: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:52 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: I found this trailer for EoE to be kind of odd http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gk72E4qgEng

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Sep 11, 2011 6:06 am Like I said in the comments to that, unintentionally funny moment right here: 'but the ultimate choice....rests with one﻿ young man....' Shinji: BWHAAAAAAAAAAAAAGH!

[]: Re: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by Sephizim » Sun Sep 11, 2011 8:13 am gatotsu911 wrote: Still, I can't hate this trailer, on account of that wonderfully appropriate Milton quote and that most excellent music. I would even venture to say that Manga is the only licensing company that has ever known how to make a trailer worth a damn, even if all their trailers play it heavy on the ham and cheese.

[]: Re: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 11, 2011 10:33 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: secondly, why is Misato kissijng Shinji??

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Sep 11, 2011 10:42 am I've always liked the one that featured clips from the live-action footage Anno ended up cutting from the finished product.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Sep 11, 2011 12:28 pm Leave the site, watch the rest of the series, come back. That trailer was ok, but spoils way to much.

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Sun Sep 11, 2011 12:29 pm Jayfive wrote: Like I said in the comments to that, unintentionally funny moment right here: 'but the ultimate choice....rests with one﻿ young man....' Shinji: BWHAAAAAAAAAAAAAGH!

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Sep 11, 2011 12:38 pm I love the quote for its existentialistic quality.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Sun Sep 11, 2011 12:41 pm Jayfive wrote: Anyway, thats not a trailer. THIS is a trailer: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W2i4nZwyjew

[]: Re: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Sep 11, 2011 12:48 pm Sephizim wrote: I have to say, in addition to that, I think Manga put together some very good DVD main menus for the two EVA movies. I always watch the menus play at least one full time through whenever I watch one. (The sub-menus are all still-shots, so whatever, but the main ones are cool)

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:21 pm I like this trailer. Filled with spoilers, but wouldn't discourage me from watching it the first time in the least.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:52 pm Yeah, it's kind of hard to recognize the spoilers as such before you've actually seen the movie. It's only in retrospect that you realize how much the trailer gave away. (Except the kiss scene, that's probably not lost on anybody.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:59 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Yeah, it's kind of hard to recognize the spoilers as such before you've actually seen the movie.

[]: Re: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 11, 2011 4:39 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Ond the Evangelion movies are their opi.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sun Sep 11, 2011 5:00 pm Bad trailer IMO, editing was just kinda all over the place.

[]: Re: Strange EoE trailer             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Sep 14, 2011 4:49 am gatotsu911 wrote: He is Trailer Man. Trailer Man cannot possibly have too deep a voice, for it is his job to impress upon us the audience the grave, grave importance of this movie that we should be seeing. Also apparently to hilariously mispronounce every bit of series terminology he comes across. Still, I can't hate this trailer, on account of that wonderfully appropriate Milton quote and that most excellent music. I would even venture to say that Manga is the only licensing company that has ever known how to make a trailer worth a damn, even if all their trailers play it heavy on the ham and cheese. Also, Rei XXV, if you haven't seen the movie yet you should probably get on that, fast. Stick around here and you will quickly be spoiled.
